message:
chore: Remove dead WasmEdge daemon files

Remove src/edgeboxd.zig and src/edgebox_run.zig - these are old WasmEdge-based
daemon implementations that are no longer used.

The active daemon now uses edgeboxd_wamr.zig (WAMR-based) which is built
by `zig build daemon` and included in the CLI build.

- src/edgeboxd.zig (13KB) - old WasmEdge daemon with Wizer snapshot restore
- src/edgebox_run.zig (104KB) - WasmEdge C SDK bridge functions

Both files have 0 imports across the codebase.
